scripts.dev: npm --prefix goodissima-intent-engine run build && next dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix goodissima-intent-engine run build && prisma generate && next build
scripts.demo:trust-credential:build: tsc scripts/demo-trust-credential.ts lib/trust-credentials.ts --outDir dist/demo-trust-credential --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.demo:trust-policy-evaluator:build: tsc scripts/demo-trust-policy-evaluator.ts lib/trust-policy-evaluator.ts lib/trust-credentials.ts --outDir dist/demo-trust-policy-evaluator --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.demo:trust-policy-requirements:build: tsc scripts/demo-trust-policy-requirements.ts lib/trust-policy-requirements.ts --outDir dist/demo-trust-policy-requirements --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.demo:candidate-identity-resolution:build: tsc scripts/demo-candidate-identity-resolution.ts lib/trust-identity.ts --outDir dist/demo-candidate-identity-resolution --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.demo:trust-admission:build: tsc scripts/demo-trust-admission.ts lib/trust-admission.ts lib/trust-identity.ts lib/trust-policy-evaluator.ts lib/trust-policy-requirements.ts lib/trust-credentials.ts --outDir dist/demo-trust-admission --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.demo:trust-admission-token:build: tsc scripts/demo-trust-admission-token.ts lib/trust-admission-tokens.ts --outDir dist/demo-trust-admission-token --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.demo:trust-admission-link:build: tsc scripts/demo-trust-admission-link.ts lib/trust-admission-tokens.ts --outDir dist/demo-trust-admission-link --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.setup:system-trust-issuer:build: tsc scripts/setup-system-trust-issuer.ts --outDir dist/setup-system-trust-issuer --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.setup:trust-admission-pilot:build: tsc scripts/setup-trust-admission-pilot.ts --outDir dist/setup-trust-admission-pilot --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.demo:user-identity:build: tsc scripts/demo-user-identity.ts lib/user-identity.ts --outDir dist/demo-user-identity --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false
scripts.qa:template-draft-quality: tsc lib/ai/template-draft-quality.ts qa/ai/template-draft-quality.test.ts --outDir dist/qa-template-draft-quality --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false && node --test dist/qa-template-draft-quality/qa/ai/template-draft-quality.test.js
scripts.qa:template-critic: tsc lib/ai/template-draft-quality.ts lib/ai/template-critic.ts qa/ai/template-critic.test.ts --outDir dist/qa-template-critic --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false && node --test dist/qa-template-critic/qa/ai/template-critic.test.js
scripts.qa:template-optimizer: tsc lib/ai/template-draft-quality.ts lib/ai/template-critic.ts lib/ai/template-optimizer.ts qa/ai/template-optimizer.test.ts --outDir dist/qa-template-optimizer --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false && node --test dist/qa-template-optimizer/qa/ai/template-optimizer.test.js
scripts.qa:template-demo-flow: tsc lib/ai/template-demo-flow.ts qa/ai/template-demo-flow.test.ts --outDir dist/qa-template-demo-flow --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false && node --test dist/qa-template-demo-flow/qa/ai/template-demo-flow.test.js
scripts.qa:ai-cost-observability: tsc lib/ai/cost-observability.ts lib/ai/value-analytics.ts qa/ai/cost-observability.test.ts --outDir dist/qa-ai-cost-observability --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmit false && node --test dist/qa-ai-cost-observability/qa/ai/cost-observability.test.js
scripts.qa:housing-candidate-demo: npm --prefix goodissima-intent-engine run build && node --experimental-strip-types --test qa/housing-candidate-demo.test.ts
